calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-21-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-21-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Ronich.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff Ambassador Hotel SRO Associates, a California limited partnership.
Plaintiff's Witness: Paul Taylor, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Sean Henderson.
EXH. 1 - Rental Agreement-------------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 2 - Three Day Notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of Property located at 55 Mason St., #407, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of the Rental Agreement.
Back Rent and Damages $397.80
Attorney's Fees $120.00
Waived Costs, for a Total of $517.80
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF AMBASSADOR HOTES SRO
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SEAN HENDERSON

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. TRIAL DATE REMAINS

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
